description: Refactor the Conductor plugin architecture by centralizing all agent capabilities within src/tools/commands.ts and removing the redundant src/commands/ directory to eliminate code duplication. This track involves updating src/index.ts to properly import and register these tools in the plugin's return object, ensuring the Conductor Agent can autonomously execute its protocols. Additionally, the implementCommand logic will be simplified by removing the strategy_section placeholder and its associated file-reading logic, while also ensuring that all command definitions correctly reference the .json prompt templates found in src/prompts/conductor/.
